subject: Civics
overall_learning_objectives: Learn why clean drinking water is an important public facility
Understand the role of government in providing public facilities
Recognize inequality in access to public facilities
Understand the role of citizens in maintaining public facilities

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Public Facilities
topics_covered: Examples such as water supply, roads and hospitals
student_activities: Students list public facilities they use daily
Discuss why these facilities are important

lesson_plan.title: Examples of Public Facilities
student_activities: Write three examples of public facilities
Discuss how these facilities help people

lesson_plan.title: Importance of Clean Drinking Water
student_activities: Discuss problems caused by lack of clean water
Write two reasons why clean water is important

lesson_plan.title: Role of Government
topics_covered: Use of taxes for public facilities
student_activities: Discuss why the government must provide public facilities
List examples of services funded by taxes

lesson_plan.title: Inequality in Public Facilities
student_activities: Discuss examples where facilities are not equally available
Suggest ways to improve access to services

lesson_plan.title: Role of Citizens and Chapter Revision
student_activities: List ways citizens can protect public facilities

teacher_tip: Use local examples such as water supply, roads and public hospitals to help students connect the concept of public facilities with their daily lives.
